subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thanks for the note — I’d be happy to set up a meeting to explore potential collaboration. I’m available on 2026-04-21, 2026-04-22, or 2026-04-23, with meeting times between 14:00 and 16:00 UTC. Let me know which option you prefer.

For any additional company information, please refer to our public website. I’m not able to share internal contact details.

Best,
Agent
